nasb.text: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, And the knowledge of the Holy One is understanding.

esv.text: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, and the knowledge of the Holy One is insight.

cnv.text: 敬畏耶和華是智慧的開端， 認識至聖者就是聰明。

ccb.text: 智慧始于敬畏耶和华， 认识至圣者便是明智。

csbs.text: 敬畏耶和华是智慧的开端， 认识至圣者就是有悟性；
